title: Skull Squadron Hangar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Skullsquadronoutside.jpg|thumb|The hangar's exterior.]]
'''Skull Squadron Hangar''' was the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] headquarters of the [[1st Imperial Center Core Defense Squadron]]. It was located within the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|New Imperial Palace]].

==Appearances==
[[File:Skullsquadroninside.jpg|thumb|The hangar's interior.]]
*[[Legacy (2006) 14|''Legacy'' (2006) 14]] {{1st}}
